summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CarryOn™ new features including document encryption, password/backup code unlock, video messages, and Resend email integration. Backend APIs fully functional with all new features working correctly. Frontend has minor OTP input interaction issue.

minor_issues.issue: Resend email service limited to test domain
minor_issues.details: Email sending restricted to barnetharris@gmail.com domain, falls back to logging OTP
minor_issues.impact: OTP emails not delivered to test accounts, but fallback logging works

ui_bugs.issue: Individual digit input fields not properly enabling submit button
ui_bugs.details: OTP digits can be entered but Verify & Sign In button remains disabled

passed_tests: Backend login flow with OTP generation
Document upload with password protection and AES-256 encryption
Backup code generation for locked documents
Document unlock with backup code authentication
Video message creation with base64 video data

success_percentage.frontend: 80% (OTP modal interaction issue prevents full login flow testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix OTP modal digit input validation - the individual input fields are not properly enabling the submit button when all 6 digits are entered. Backend OTP verification works correctly.
